name: Louis Cottrell Jr.
description: '''Louis Albert Cottrell Jr.''' (March 7, 1911 – March 21, 1978) was a [[Louisiana Creole people|Louisiana Creole]] [[jazz]] [[clarinet]]ist and [[tenor saxophone|tenor saxophonist]]. He was the son of the influential drummer [[Louis Cottrell, Sr.]], and grandfather of New Orleans jazz drummer [[Louis Cottrell III]]. As leader of the Heritage Hall Jazz Band, he performed at [[Carnegie Hall]] in 1974.
